---
title: "Super Soaker Gen Z Fan Engagement & Experiential Marketing Strategy "
---

## Business Context

Super Soakerz was a student-led campus marketing initiative focused on providing window washing services to college students living on campus.

## Marketing Challenge

The primary challenge involved building awareness and trust among students while operating as a new small business.

## Target Audience Insight

- College students living in campus housing  
- Price-sensitive but convenience-driven  
- Influenced by peer recommendations  

## Strategy Execution

- On-campus outreach and demonstrations  
- Social proof through satisfied customers  
- Peer-to-peer promotional messaging  

## Skills Demonstrated

- Grassroots marketing strategy  
- Consumer engagement execution  
- Brand awareness development  
- Small business positioning  

## Strategic Framework Used

- SWOT Analysis  
- Competitive Positioning Map  
- Consumer Journey Mapping  
- Brand Equity Evaluation  

## Next Project

[Back to Portfolio](projects.html)
